story.text: Before value/money ever propagates, split it into at least loved / adopted / reused / pattern_setting — each grounded in a different evidence kind (local / network / structural-dependency / temporal-doctrinal) and propagating differently. No scalar money. (Definition stays bdo s; this is the mechanism that keeps it from taste-only collapse.)

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'consequence-graph' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.consequence-graph-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
